headline: Solaris Energy: Renting Generators Has More Risk Than Priced In Shares
summary: Solaris Energy (SEI) rated a sell: mobile gas turbine rentals for data centers face execution and funding risks, negative FCF to 2028. Here's what investors need to know about the company.

headline: When Trump Cuts Tariffs on Farm and Construction Equipment, These 5 Stocks Win Big
summary: The Trump administration is about to hand five equipment makers a margin gift, and the window to position is closing fast. I’ve been tracking this tariff-relief setup across the industrial complex for months, and per the Marketplace Morning Report’s Nova Safo, tariffs on imported agricultural and manufacturing machinery containing steel, aluminum, and copper drop from ...
